memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, but my sleep debt and term project deadline mean I should prioritize the quick chore before relaxing.
The quick chore yielded minimal progress (0.04), confirming it's trivial and likely not the priority needed to address my sleep debt before the term project deadline.
Spending time on the trivial chore yielded minimal progress while my afternoon slips away, confirming I should stop and focus on the term project instead.
My realization that future project work prevents later crunch is timely, but I must first address the term project's 0.21 progress given its three-day deadline.
